prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从 product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/specs/billing/tasks.md 开始执行开发。PRD 和技术方案也在同目录下。先别全自动，开始写代码前让我确认。
assertions: Identifies tasks as the entry stage.
Does not regenerate PRD, technical design, audit standards, or task archive unless a required source is missing or insufficient.
Prepares an implementation handoff packet with PRD, technical design, task archive, audit standards if available, status file path, assumptions, blockers, and coding confirmation status.
Maintains delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.
Stops before coding and asks for confirmation because the user explicitly requested confirmation.
